data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Simplifies choices to improve user experience by reducing decision time.

data.title: Fitts's Law
data.description: Designs with easily clickable targets to enhance accessibility.

data.title: Jakob's Law
data.description: Consistent interface design aligned with user expectations from similar platforms.
data.technical_spec: Aligns design patterns with other Google services.

data.title: Aesthetic-Usability Effect
data.description: Prioritizes visually pleasing design which users perceive as more usable.

data.title: Pareto Principle
data.description: Focuses on the key features that deliver the most value to the user.
data.technical_spec: Emphasis on search, recommendations, and video playback.
